caption: An older man with grey hair and glasses stands behind a wooden podium, delivering a presentation. He is wearing a light blue, patterned button-down shirt with a decorative colorful design across the chest. The podium features a logo with the text "LIBRARIES" visible on the front. A black microphone is positioned in front of him. In the foreground, the backs of several people's heads are visible as they listen to the speaker. The background consists of a wall with brown horizontal blinds and wooden panels. On the right side of the scene, a white box containing the text "ORCA" is overlaid on the image. Across the frames, the man continues to speak, slightly shifting his posture and head position while remaining at the podium. The overall setting and composition of the scene remain consistent throughout the sequence.
